item.title: Kurt Sova’s Case Remains Unsolved After 40 Years
item.description: Brooke Makenna explores the long-unsolved case of Kurt Sova and the questions that remain after four decades.

item.title: Young Girl TAKEN From Her Bedroom
item.description: An overview of the Danielle van Dam case, covering the investigation, key evidence, and how authorities ultimately brought resolution to the case.

item.title: The Lone Survivor Teen Witnesses Her Family’s Tragic End
item.description: An overview of the Cassidy Stay case, covering the tragic home invasion, the investigation that followed, and the survivor’s account of events.

item.title: The Bizarre Case Of Heidi Allen
item.description: An overview of the Heidi Allen case, covering her disappearance, the investigation that followed, and the key developments and unanswered questions.

item.title: This Spoiled Son Decides To Make His Family Disappear
item.description: An overview of the Ewell family case, examining the investigation, key events, and the legal proceedings that followed.
